programme.title: Kampong Pisang Bersiri Siri Ep01
programme.desc: Kg. Pisang is in a state of chaos because of a robbery case involving Barkoba's gold. Is it because of a sabotage, or because of something paranormal?

programme.title: Susuk
programme.desc: Imran is a good son to his mother. He takes care of his mother even though his mother has been behaving strangely ever since she fell sick. This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

programme.title: Santau
programme.desc: Halim, Nina and their daughter Tuti lead a comfortable life in a modern Malay village. Halim is held in high esteem by the villagers who praise his successful career and beautiful family. However, since the new neighbours moved in next door, things happen that cannot be explained. Tuti keeps seeing shadows whereas Nina has turned into a slovenly and quick-tempered woman. Halim is too caught up wit

programme.title: Sarang Hantu Jakarta
programme.desc: David is a young and successful executive with an attractive and loving wife named Selva and wonderful daughter named Binta. Life is perfect, even though there are often ghostly sightings of pochong and kuntilanak and eerie happenings in their home. David dismisses it all and believes it is because of the ghost stories that their domestic helpers like to tell, despite the servants leaving and refu

programme.title: Eyang Putri
programme.desc: Eyang Sri, 73, lives by herself after a strange tragedy struck the child of a maid and a nurse at her house. Her granddaughter, Gendis, 25, with her husband Reza dan her stepson agreed to live with Eyang and take care of her. But Eyang strange behaviour scared Gendis and put threats on her stepson and Eyang herself. The horror starts when changes in Eyang behaviour become more frequent.

programme.title: Ghost Father
programme.desc: A student is hired to look after the little girl of a wealthy single mom who is usually away for work. The mother and daughter live in a mansion located in near a pine forest. Come nightfall, the strangest things happen in the house. The nanny cannot help but notice, and she feels as though there is someone - or something - watching her. programme.title: Pontianak Sesat Dalam Kampung
programme.desc: On a mission to find the naughtiest person's blood to save King Ponti, Ros Kembang wanders into a village. Starring Kamal Adli and Emma Maembong.

programme.title: Misterius
programme.desc: Lestari's husband died three years ago, and she has been running a garment business on her own. She has two grown children, Agus and Wulan. programme.title: The Blood of Wolves
programme.desc: 1988, Hiroshima. Undercover cop, Hioka, is assigned to investigate Ogami, a veteran detective rumored to be in cahoots with the yakuza. As they get closer to uncovering the truth of a missing Kurehara Finance employee, a front company of a criminal syndicate Kakomura-gumi, Hioka discovers Ogami's unbelievable past.

On the night of the waning moon, an uninvited guest accidentally provokes the ghost to become angry and she kills everyone. Because of this incident, Thanathip goes back in time to discover the truth behind the woman's death.

programme.title: Deep Fear
programme.desc: Paris, the Eighties.three students decide to celebrate their graduation with a visit of Paris catacombs. When they discover the legendary 717 Bunker, little do they know it's not the only thing Nazi soldiers have left behind them. Something, someone, is hunting them. Trapped deep underground, the group needs to get out before it's too late.

programme.title: Orang Minyak Kampung Lenggong
programme.desc: Amir makes a pact with a supernatural village elder for wealth, but breaking the no-bribe rule ruins him. To reclaim riches, he becomes the feared Orang Minyak, hunting corrupt men in Lenggong village.

In each episode, the squad will be given the enormous task of researching and preparing a local dish. programme.title: Sembang Sihat S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: What is the difference between type 1 and type 2 diabetes? Is it a lifelong illness? Is amputation an inevitability? Husin Saaban and Lydia Izzati share their worries.

programme.title: Calon Isteri Buat Suami - EP 4
programme.desc: Haizi and Nazim adjust to their arranged marriage and slowly grow closer. At the same time, Haizi continues trying to find him a suitable partner, as promised to Yasmin.

programme.title: En Bloc - EP 3
programme.desc: En Bloc takes a look into the lives of residents of HUDC apartments. Riveting stories of jealousy, revenge, suspicion and misunderstanding lurk behind closed doors and threaten to spill as well as implicate other neighbours. This adds on to the frenzy when the residents hear news that a committee was set up to put their homes up for en bloc sale.

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 20
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 7
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: One On One - EP 3
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will reveal stories that have never been shared with celebrities in the country.

programme.title: Mawar Dahlia - EP 7

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 72
programme.desc: Riqmal’s lawyer tells Riqmal that his case will fall through after finding out the truth from Puan Ida. Riqmal slowly falls into a state of depression as everyone starts to distance themselves from him.

programme.title: Makan Skuad - EP 11
programme.desc: Makan Skuad is a fun children cooking show, a spin-off from the successful Skuad Cilik series. In each episode, the squad will be given the enormous task of researching and preparing a local dish. Follow their journey in in their quest to uncover stories and knowledge about the food we love and cooking up a storm to be critiqued by the professionals and personalities of the week for their verdict

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters; SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton invents a machine enabling him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs; SpongeBob volunteers for lifeguard duty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dress up as Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy to attend a shuffleboard tournament in their place; Squidward is mistaken for his rival Squilliam and is invited to teach a class at a prestigious music school.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish; Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he has to get to the store if he wants to use it; Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he will have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs; SpongeBob and Patrick discover a lost ship.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Pat sell candy bars door to door, they end up buying more than they sell; superheroes visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner; the Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his turn as hall monitor; SpongeBob brings home a wild jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' old fry cook pays a visit to the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob invests in night lights to ward off the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy is the only one who can save them; Patrick is sleepwalking, and SpongeBob is unable to wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the key to the vault holding the Krabby Patty recipe is lost, SpongeBob must locate it before the recipe is lost forever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When stray snails begin appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself; Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition in order to defend Bikini Bottom's honor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell Krabby Patties in the stands; SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to sell a moldy krabby patty; Spongebob breaks his butt while sand sledding.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Rock quests for an ancient artifact in order to prove he is worthy of working with his modeling role model, Franz Roll; Paper and Scissors compete to be more supportive of Rock in the hopes that one of them will head his entourage.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out; SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too; while preparing to give an oral report for boating school, SpongeBob realizes that he's got a case of stage fright.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners; SpongeBob and Patrick find themselves left behind on one of Sandy's extreme wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairy tale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors; Squidward hosts a secret We Hate SpongeBob Club at his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob and Patrick to spy on Plankton; Squidward and SpongeBob make an instructional video on boating techniques; Mr. Krabs holds a contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy; SpongeBob and Squidward go to the Kelpy G concert.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are cursed when they anger the Flying Dutchman; Squidward and SpongeBob must share a locker.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; SpongeBob and Patrick watch their heroes fight bad guys.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob fails his driving test, forcing Mrs Puff to think outside the box and off the road.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While working the graveyard shift, Squidward tells SpongeBob a scary story about the Hash Slinging Slasher; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn SpongeBob's house into an indoor miniature golf course! When SpongeBob realizes how many memories are attached to all of his possessions, he is reluctant to throw anything way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her dome of fleas; Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's doughnut; SpongeBob washes dishes at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats for Gary; when Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty, Mr. Krabs tries to keep him from collecting his prize.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Once Fred's leg heals up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way; Patrick's lemonade stand is unsuccessful until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob and Patrick play hide and seek.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Scissors helps Paper have a weekend interesting enough to impress Pencil; even more exciting: Rock buys a hat; Rock, Paper and Scissors try to prove they shouldn't be replaced by their incredible new friend, Putty.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever; when Lincoln finds a letter in the attic, he begins to believe there is money hidden somewhere in the house.

programme.desc: The sisters enlist Lincoln, the "Master of Convincing," to teach them how to ask their parents for money; when Lisa's report card reveals that she has failed social skills, she must make a friend in order to bring up her grade.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln begins spending time at Clyde's house when Clyde's fathers give him more attention than he gets at home; when Lincoln wins a ride in a limo, he begins to change after getting a taste of the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Leni and her friends start hanging out at Gus', Lincoln and the gang start a turf war for control; Lucy gets jealous of Lola's newfound attention after she joins the Mortician's Club.

programme.desc: Devan threatens to punch David in mid-air, Joe blows up at his crew, the water-bombers arrive at “Iron Maiden” singer Bruce Dickinson's hangar in Wales, and Will threatens to quit.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai's thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there's more bad news that could put Sarah's big plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: "The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there's a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai's food offerings.".

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah's new menu.

programme.desc: In order to ruin the relationship between Ziyuan and Yang Tao, Zhian deliberately tells Ziyuan that Kaisen had a big fight with Yang Tao on the day of his death. Ziyuan was shocked and confronts Yang Tao, who acquiesced, but did not reveal the reason for the quarrel. Ziyuan suspects that Yang Tao is the one who ordered the killing of Kaisen, and no longer trusts him.
